SPLIT + SINGLE SETTINGS CONTENT ENGLISH FALLBACK TOKEN INSPECTOR Edit every CSS token in the theme contract. Color-like tokens include swatches and native color pickers for fast authoring. UI-SCALE LAYOUT GLOBAL UI SCALE MULTIPLIER. DEFAULT 1 CURRENT 1 EFFECTIVE 1 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT HEADER-HEIGHT LAYOUT HEADER HEIGHT FOR THE APPLICATION SHELL. DEFAULT CALC(32PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 32PX EFFECTIVE 32PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT RAIL-WIDTH LAYOUT ACTION RAIL WIDTH. DEFAULT CALC(44PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 44PX EFFECTIVE 44PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT RAIL-HEIGHT LAYOUT ACTION RAIL ROW HEIGHT. DEFAULT CALC(44PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 44PX EFFECTIVE 44PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT SIDEBAR-WIDTH LAYOUT SIDEBAR WIDTH. DEFAULT CALC(200PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 200PX EFFECTIVE 200PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT STATUS-HEIGHT LAYOUT STATUS BAR HEIGHT. DEFAULT CALC(20PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 20PX EFFECTIVE 20PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT TAB-HEIGHT LAYOUT TAB STRIP HEIGHT. DEFAULT VAR(--HEADER-HEIGHT) CURRENT 32PX EFFECTIVE 32PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT PANEL-HEADER-HEIGHT LAYOUT PANEL HEADER HEIGHT. DEFAULT CALC(30PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 30PX EFFECTIVE 30PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT RAIL-BTN-SIZE LAYOUT ACTION RAIL BUTTON SIZE. DEFAULT CALC(30PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT CALC(30PX * 1) EFFECTIVE CALC(30PX * 1) COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT BG-APP COLOR TOP-LEVEL APPLICATION BACKGROUND. DEFAULT #C0C0C0 CURRENT #000000 EFFECTIVE #000000 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT BG-PANEL COLOR PANEL BACKGROUND. DEFAULT #ECECEC CURRENT #FFFFFF EFFECTIVE #FFFFFF COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT BG-INSET COLOR INSET SURFACE BACKGROUND. DEFAULT #DCDCDC CURRENT #F0F0F0 EFFECTIVE #F0F0F0 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT BORDER-COLOR COLOR PRIMARY BORDER COLOR. DEFAULT #000000 CURRENT #000000 EFFECTIVE #000000 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT BORDER-WIDTH LAYOUT PRIMARY BORDER WIDTH. DEFAULT 2PX CURRENT 2.5PX EFFECTIVE 2.5PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT FG-PRIMARY COLOR PRIMARY FOREGROUND COLOR. DEFAULT #000000 CURRENT #000000 EFFECTIVE #000000 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT FG-SECONDARY COLOR SECONDARY FOREGROUND COLOR. DEFAULT #333333 CURRENT #111111 EFFECTIVE #111111 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT FG-MUTED COLOR MUTED FOREGROUND COLOR. DEFAULT #666666 CURRENT #666666 EFFECTIVE #666666 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT ACCENT COLOR ACCENT COLOR. DEFAULT #FF3E00 CURRENT #FF3C00 EFFECTIVE #FF3C00 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT TABLE-HEADER-BG COLOR MARKDOWN TABLE HEADER BACKGROUND. DEFAULT VAR(--BG-INSET) CURRENT #000000 EFFECTIVE #000000 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT TABLE-HEADER-FG COLOR MARKDOWN TABLE HEADER FOREGROUND. DEFAULT VAR(--FG-PRIMARY) CURRENT #FFFFFF EFFECTIVE #FFFFFF COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT TABLE-ROW-PRIMARY-BG COLOR ODD MARKDOWN TABLE ROW BACKGROUND. DEFAULT VAR(--BG-PANEL) CURRENT #FFFFFF EFFECTIVE #FFFFFF COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT TABLE-ROW-SECONDARY-BG COLOR EVEN MARKDOWN TABLE ROW BACKGROUND. DEFAULT VAR(--BG-INSET) CURRENT #F0F0F0 EFFECTIVE #F0F0F0 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT STATUS-OK STATUS SUCCESS STATUS COLOR. DEFAULT #00CC00 CURRENT #00FF41 EFFECTIVE #00FF41 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT STATUS-WARN STATUS WARNING STATUS COLOR. DEFAULT #FF8800 CURRENT #FFCC00 EFFECTIVE #FFCC00 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT STATUS-ERROR STATUS ERROR STATUS COLOR. DEFAULT #CC0000 CURRENT #FF0000 EFFECTIVE #FF0000 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT APP-GAP SPACING PRIMARY GAP BETWEEN SHELL REGIONS. DEFAULT CALC(4PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT 3PX EFFECTIVE 3PX COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT TEXTURE-OPACITY INTERACTION TEXTURE OVERLAY OPACITY. DEFAULT 0.05 CURRENT .08 EFFECTIVE .08 COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT EDITOR-PADDING SPACING EDITOR INNER PADDING. DEFAULT CALC(24PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT CALC(24PX * 1) EFFECTIVE CALC(24PX * 1) COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT FILE-INDENT-BASE SPACING BASE INDENTATION FOR FILE TREE ITEMS. DEFAULT CALC(12PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT CALC(12PX * 1) EFFECTIVE CALC(12PX * 1) COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT FILE-INDENT-UNIT SPACING INCREMENTAL INDENTATION FOR NESTED FILE TREE ITEMS. DEFAULT CALC(12PX * VAR(--UI-SCALE)) CURRENT CALC(12PX * 1) EFFECTIVE CALC(12PX * 1) COLOR PICKER DRAFT USE DEFAULT COPY CURRENT CLEAR DRAFT C-EXPLORER-HOVER INTERACTION EXPLORER HOVER BACKGROUND. DEFAULT RGBA(0, 0, 0, 0.06) CURRENT RGB
